description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a light woodgrain top and sturdy metal legs, designed for practical use in shared or public environments. The tabletop is smooth and spacious, suitable for writing, working, or placing electronic devices. The legs are made of metal, with a two-tone finish: the upper part is black and the lower part is a lighter gray, providing both stability and a modern aesthetic. On one side, there is an attached under-desk tray or shelf, likely intended for cable management or storing small items. The overall construction appears robust, with clean lines and a functional design. This desk would fit well in urban settings such as libraries, classrooms, or co-working spaces.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a light woodgrain top, sturdy two-tone metal legs, and an under-desk tray for storage or cable management.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the woodgrain top and both metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the attached under-desk tray on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back support bar and both legs, with the tray partially visible underneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the desk's depth and the under-desk tray on the left.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge without the under-desk tray, with the tray positioned on the right side when seated.
